_comment: Single source of truth for the org's managed-repo list, referenced by pin-consistency.yml, deep-audit.yml, and budget-governor.yml so the three never drift from each other (see issue #233). '.github' itself is deliberately excluded — it's this repo, not a consumer of it. Cold-tier repos (suxos-net, nix) are also deliberately excluded even though they carry the minimal cold caller set (single weekly fixer, no pr-watch/pr-unstick/claude/audit): caller-conformance's canonical-stub sweep would flag their intentionally-smaller set as drift every night (#638). 'dependencies' is an optional map of repo -> [repos it depends on and should be verified against on their merge to main]; omitted or absent-key means no declared dependency edges. Consumed only by dependency-notify.yml/dependency-verify.yml — every other consumer (pin-consistency, deep-audit, budget-governor, self-fabric-health) reads .repos only and is unaffected.
